The Company

A Different Kind
of Production Company.

On January 15th, 2026, Aria and Kai Underwood were born. And with them, the name Twin Vision finally meant exactly what it was always supposed to mean.

Every writer, producer, and director has had a vision — something they couldn't yet see but refused to stop believing in. That's the nature of this work. You build toward a finish line you can feel before you can find it. The twins are that fuel. They are the reason the tunnel stays lit when everything else goes dark.

At Twin Vision Productions, we believe that adversity isn't a detour — it's the road. We plan our work, work our plan, and we keep our eyes fixed on where we're going. In time, we will get there. Every project on this slate is proof that vision, discipline, and the right motivation can build something real — from nothing, on purpose, for a reason.

"Everyone has a vision — something they can't yet see but believe. The twins are my fuel. In time, we will get there."

Rashod Underwood — Creator, Writer & Producer. Father of Aria and Kai. Los Angeles-based storyteller building an 18-project slate across five genres — with everything to prove and everything to fight for.

Twin Vision Productions LLC — Named for Aria and Kai Underwood, born January 15th, 2026. Delaware-incorporated independent production and development company built with tunnel vision toward one finish line.

Full Development Infrastructure — Every project includes a series bible, pilot script, pitch deck, and platform targeting. All 18 properties fully developed. Materials available upon request.

Active Attachment: Nile Evans (EP/Showrunner, MTV's Wild 'N Out; EP, Prime Video & Skydance Sports) in discussions to showrun Rent & Go.

Rashod Underwood · Creator & Producer

The Slate — 18 Properties

Every Project.
Fully Developed.

01 Lead Project · Showrunner in Discussion

Rent & Go

Comedy · Mockumentary · 22-24 Min

When a reluctant aspiring model is forced to run his injured father's struggling rental car company in South L.A., he must modernize a dysfunctional team, fend off a street-level fraud operation quietly siphoning their fleet, and prove himself to the neighborhood — all while refusing to admit this place might actually be home.

Hulu BET+ Peacock The Office comps Abbott Elementary comps
02 Feature Film

Stripped

Horror / Dark Comedy · Feature Film · ~90 Min

When five college students attend a Halloween ABC Party, one who skipped the spiked welcome punch discovers their host house is haunted by seven founding members of an underground arts collective — each with an unfinished score to settle.

Blumhouse A24 Netflix $5M–$20M Budget
03

The Tour Guide

Thriller / Dark Comedy / Crime · 45-55 Min Anthology

A beloved tour-bus driver is the charming face of an international criminal network preying on tourists — until one woman refuses to become another victim. Season 1: Jamaica. Season 2: Morocco. Season 3: Thailand.

Netflix HBO Apple TV+ Globe-Trotting
04

Hypocrite

Dark Comedy · 30-45 Min Series

A world-famous relationship coach whose wife just filed for divorce must keep his crumbling private life secret while coaching an NFL star, a family-values senator with four estranged kids, and a newlywed couple whose marriage looks exactly like his own.

Netflix HBO FX Succession comps
05

Twin Ventures

Comedy · Mockumentary · 30 Min

Two broke, overly confident best friends navigate bad pitches, worse decisions, and the specific chaos of trying to build something real in Inglewood — one catastrophic startup meeting at a time.

Netflix Hulu Gen Z / Millennial
06

What We Never Said

Drama / Dark Comedy · Prestige · Dual Timeline

When the Harmon family gathers for Christmas, a relationship coach son discovers the secret he's been protecting for seven years isn't the one he thought — and the lie everyone's been keeping is thirty years older than he knew. Told across two parallel timelines.

Netflix HBO 3-Season Arc Prestige Drama
07

Somebody Else's Kids

Animation · Family Comedy · Dual Animation Style

A veteran foster parent navigating the gap between what the system promises and what it delivers — told in a groundbreaking dual animation style that shifts between the children's magical inner world and the harsh reality adults see. A show that earns its heartbreak and its laughs equally.

Netflix Hulu Unique Animation Format Family
08

A Christmas Banger

Dark Comedy · HBCU Setting · 30 Min

Three HBCU best friends throw a low-key Christmas birthday banger in Atlanta. One uninvited guest. One loaded situationship. One gun aimed at the wrong people. Low-key was always a lie.

Netflix HBO Max Atlanta comps HBCU Audience
09

A Moment Too Late

Dark Comedy · Dramedy · Feature or Pilot

When a tight-knit circle of Black professionals each face the catastrophic consequences of their greatest act of procrastination, they're forced to reckon with time itself — and the terrifying question: is it too late?

Netflix HBO Atlanta comps Fleabag comps
10

Cocky Brown

Adult Animation · Baltimore Setting · 22 Min

A 38-year-old Baltimore man launches his rap career, runs a label out of a barbershop, beefs with rivals on live TV, tries to sign a viral white girl rapper named Cream Puff, and somehow keeps his family together — all while refusing to admit he peaked fifteen years ago.

Adult Swim Comedy Central The Boondocks comps Baltimore
11

Side Out

Comedy · Single Camera · AAU Volleyball · 30 Min

A broke-but-proud Hispanic dad, his childless hype-man brother-in-law, and his fiercely competitive wife blow their savings every weekend on the AAU volleyball circuit — chasing their daughters' dreams while navigating the most intense, most overlooked sports world in America.

Netflix HBO Max ABC 3-Season Arc
12

Race of Friends

Comedy · Ensemble · 30 Min

Four strangers answer the same Craigslist ad at 3 AM and end up building the family they didn't know they needed — one roommate dispute, boundary violation, and accidental intervention at a time.

HBO FX Netflix Insecure comps
13

Gate Crashers

Comedy · Scripted Mockumentary · Animated Cold Opens

Inside Meridian Group — a mid-size company solicited by every vendor, rep, and hustler in America — a 15-year veteran gatekeeper and a bewildered new hire try to hold the line against the most creative, desperate, and occasionally brilliant people in every industry.

Peacock FX Netflix Abbott + Curb comps
14

Paws & Clause

Comedy · Single-Camera Mockumentary · 30 Min

Three competing nonprofits in the emotional support animal certification space — a beloved 30-year institution, a VC-funded startup 45 days old, and the animals themselves — collide over a city contract that only one of them can win. Senator the iguana has more institutional wisdom than anyone in the building.

Peacock NBC Netflix The Office × Succession
15

Rolling Plates

Scripted Dramedy · Road Show · 30 Min

A burned-out married couple quits everything, sells their house, buys an RV, and drags their adult kids across America as amateur food bloggers — chasing one perfect plate at a time, and running from everything they left behind.

Netflix Hulu BET+ The Bear comps
16

Please Hold

Comedy · Ensemble · Call Center Setting

At Apex Solutions — a chaotic, underfunded call center where every department handles something wildly different — a crew of over-it workers, office lovers, lunch thieves, and phone warriors try to survive the worst job in America without losing their minds or each other.

Netflix Peacock The Office comps Workaholics comps
17

The Christmas Wish List

Dramedy / Social Thriller · 30 Min Series

A Black millennial brand ambassador navigates ambition and Instagram performance anxiety — until a mysterious online admirer starts delivering everything on her Christmas list, and a catfish slowly closes in.

Netflix Hulu OWN Female-Led
18

The Block

Comedy · Single Camera · 30 Min

A 30-year-old high school gym teacher tries to keep his rebellious teenage sister off the internet and out of trouble — while working in the same school she attends. The problem: she's funnier, more popular, and far more internet-famous than he'll ever be.

Hulu Peacock BET+ Bernie Mac comps
